title: Videographer & Video Editor
description_html:
We are looking for a creative and passionate Videographer & Video Editor to join our Video Production Team. You will play an important part in producing engaging, high-quality video content that brings ideas and stories to life across various digital platforms for our clients.

You will be involved in the full video production process, including planning, filming, editing, and final delivery. This role requires a strong eye for visual storytelling, attention to detail, and the ability to turn ideas into compelling visual content that aligns with the company’s creative direction.

You will assist in operating cameras, lighting, and audio equipment during shoots, as well as perform post-production tasks such as video editing and basic colour correction. You will also work closely with the creative team to ensure all video content meets brand guidelines and project objectives.

We are looking for someone with good technical knowledge in videography and video editing, strong organisational skills, and the ability to manage multiple projects within deadlines. A portfolio showcasing your video production work is highly preferred.

If you enjoy bringing stories to life through video and thrive in a creative team environment, we would love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Able to direct shoots and provide creative direction.
Able to assist in coordinating the production team.
Trim footage segments and combine the sequences of the film.
Develop and execute overall video brand messaging strategy.
Prepare rough and final cuts for the videos.
Input effects, graphics, dialogues, and music into videos to enhance visual appeal.
Insert music and necessary sound effects to the video clips.
Assist in monitoring all technical aspects of recording and editing to ensure quality standards.
Discover and implement new videography/video editing techniques and methods to maximize the company’s efficiency.
Work both on-site and off-site as required.
Collaborate with stakeholders from production to post-production process.
Work effectively with the team members.
desired_skills: 2-4+ years of experience as a Videographer, Video Editor, Video Specialist or similar role in the Media Industry.
A complete portfolio depicting previous work.
Solid experience of using video editing software like Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro or Davinci Resolve.
Creative thinker and excellent time management skills.
Work both on and off-site and pull off long hours if production isn't completed.
